---
title: "Esben Lykke"
image: "profile_pic.png"
links:
  - label: Linkedin
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/esben-lykke/"
  - label: Github
    url: "https://github.com/esbenlykke"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/EsbenLS"
  - label: e-mail
    url: "mailto:eskovgaard@health.sdu.dk"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
## Bio

Text on it's way...

Work involves the development of methodologies for the detection of sleep stages in accelerometer data from children using machine learning techniques supervised by Associate Professor Jan Christian Brønd.


## Education

University of Southern Denmark | Odense, DK

*2023* PhD in Exercise Epidemiology | Department of Sports Science and Clinical Biomechanics

Aarhus University | Aarhus, DK

*2017* MSc in Sports Science, Human Physiology

*2014* BSc in Sports Science

## Experience

to be updated...
